title: "All these resolution threads, and i still can't fix it."

### Post by ddum on 2007-11-10
So, i have a 7300GS with HDMI out. I connect that through my Yamaha RX-V661 (HDMI-Switch) to my LG 42LC42 (LCD, Native Resolution is 1366x768).

I am using Mythbuntu 7.10 with the nVidia restricted driver.

No matter what i do, i only get 720x480 resolution. I have been over the existing threads and google back and front.

root@Fusion:/etc# cat /etc/X11/xorg.conf
# nvidia-settings: X configuration file generated by nvidia-settings

Section "ServerLayout"

### Post by superm1 on 2007-11-10
Sounds to me like there is something about the EDID not in agreement right now.

In the "modes" area, please add "nvidia-auto-select" to the front of the list and see if that works.

If it doesn't, then post your /var/log/Xorg.0.log.  The debugging level may have to be bumped up to 6 possibly depending on what it includes.
  Post it after adding nvidia-auto-select and we'll see.

---
